title: 有馬記念の後に・友を繋ぎし誠は信

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap takes first place at the Arima Kinen.
While Yaeno Muteki acknowledges her rival's
prowess, she also recognizes her own growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her victory, the audience proclaims
Oguri Cap the star of the generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one says Yaeno Muteki's name. No one
mentions the clash that took place at the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rage burns within Yaeno Muteki. She cries that
she and the others who battled for the Classic
Triple Crown are the real stars of the generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swears to defeat Oguri Cap and prove that
she and her friends are the ones leading this
generation. She now has the piece that she has
been missing—an obsession.
